name: School Friends Class of 2026
overview: The final year. The highest stakes. And a friendship that refuses to fade. School Friends: Class of 2026 is a high-energy high school drama where three best friends step into their last year expecting memories… and walk into a world of rising pressure, shifting equations, and emotions that hit harder than any exam. Expect friendship, first love, rivalry, heartbreak, ambition, and that unstoppable “us vs the world” spirit. It’s messy. It’s funny. It’s painfully real. And when everything starts testing them, they’ll have to decide what they’re fighting for… and who they’re fighting with.

trailers.title: School Friends Class of 2026 | Official Trailer | Ft. Manu Rishi, Aaditya, Arista & Rishabh
